rooms.label: 32b
rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.gm_note: The spigot still works: hot, clean water.

rooms.label: 30a
rooms.name: Zigzagging Hall
rooms.gm_note: Anti-archer hall. The berserk air elemental charges any opened door.

rooms.name: Eye See You!
rooms.gm_note: Sixteen heraldic shields. One of Halaster’s scrying eyes studies the party, then vanishes.

rooms.label: 30b
rooms.name: Guard Room

monsters.name: Air Elemental
monsters.note: berserk and trapped; howls constantly; rushes any opened door

rooms.gm_note: Wrecked gear on the floor. Secret door west to a tunnel connecting to 31.

rooms.name: Hall of Rats

monsters.name: Wererat
monsters.note: Flyndol Greeth, sleeping as an obese giant rat on the throne; surrenders if cornered

rooms.gm_note: Two dry dwarf-face fountains in the south wall. Flyndol awaits Sylvia (31).

rooms.name: South Dormitory
rooms.gm_note: Like 33, plus an elf skeleton with serviceable hide armor and quarterstaff.

rooms.name: Delvers' Hall

monsters.name: Wererat
monsters.note: Sylvia Featherstone in giant rat form; Xanathar spy hunting secret doors; flees to 35

rooms.gm_note: Dwarf statues in alcoves; one pushed aside reveals the secret tunnel to 30b.

rooms.label: 28b
rooms.name: Obelisk of the Eye
rooms.gm_note: Goblin bunkroom around a 14-ft obelisk. First bare-handed touch: Halaster’s telepathic riddle pointing to 38/39a and the stairs to level 2.

rooms.label: 28c
rooms.name: East Chamber

monsters.name: Goblin
monsters.note: jittery, bows trained on the east tunnel; ordered to kill gricks

rooms.gm_note: Dead goblins and a dead grick on the floor. Secret door north (defenders unaware).

rooms.label: 28a
rooms.name: West Chamber
rooms.gm_note: Part of Grick Snack watch post (2 bugbears + 6 goblins total).

rooms.label: 36b
rooms.name: Trapped Fellow

monsters.name: Spy
monsters.note: Kelim the Weasel, sealed in the west closet; weeping; treacherous if rescued

rooms.gm_note: Kelim trades a stolen spellbook (11 spells incl. lightning bolt) for rescue. Companion: he will betray anyone to save himself.

rooms.label: 36a
rooms.name: Cricks!
rooms.gm_note: Partially collapsed hall strewn with skull-crushing debris.

rooms.label: 36c
rooms.name: Upside-Down Throne

monsters.name: Grick Alpha
monsters.note: gorged and sleeping; ignores anyone staying 10 ft away

rooms.gm_note: Permanent reverse gravity above 10 ft (dispel DC 18). Mummified minotaur on a ceiling throne has gem eyes (10 gp agate, 50 gp zircon).

rooms.label: 28d
rooms.name: Concealed Spiked Pit
rooms.gm_note: Floor lid over a 30-ft spiked pit (3d6 + 2d10; DC 15 Perception to spot). Dead goblin below has a lucky dwarf-thumb charm.
